name: Caramel Turtles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine caramels and whipped topping in a heatproof bowl. Heat over simmering water, stirring until the mixture is smooth and well blended. Let cool slightly.
2. Place pecan halves on a lightly greased baking sheet in groups of 3, arranging them so that one pecan half forms the turtle's head while the other two form the legs on each side.
3. Carefully spoon the melted caramel over each group of 3 pecan halves, leaving the ends of the pecan halves showing. Let set until hard.
4. Melt chocolate chips in a heatproof bowl over simmering water, stirring until smooth. Let cool slightly.
5. Spoon melted chocolate over the caramel topping on the pecan halves, taking care not to cover the turtle's heads and legs. Let set until hard.
